feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Extended Warehouse Management
feed.subtitle: SAP Extended Warehouse Management Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Assign Activities to Text Identifier visible in RF
entry.content:
Hello,

Under the standard config of, 'Assign Activities to Text Identifiers' it says we can activate text to be visible within RF. I have assigned TX17 to activity, Pick.  

There doesn't seem to be anyway to view the text passed from the sales order into RF.

 

Our business scenario: On certain deliveries to specific customers, we must pack in a very unique way. We will be creating HUs on RF as we pick for the outbound delivery. At the time of picking, our picker needs to know if this is the unique scenario for packing.

entry.title: \/SCWM/IM_PC transaction code, all line items are visible, including those that have not been staged
entry.content:
We have created a process order after which we perform partial staging using transaction COR2. However, I've noticed that in the /SCWM/IM_PC transaction code, all line items are visible, including those that have not been staged.

 

Ideally, we should only see the line item that has been staged. Because of this behavior every delivery document contains all the components which are already staged or needs to be staged. We get quantity as zero for the components which are not staged, however by this behavior our users get confused as all the materials show up every time and it is inconvenient as a human to check all the materials to find which has quantity more than zero.

 

Kindly help us on this process as we wish to only see the components which are staged while the delivery is created, this would help the users to efficiently bring in the required quantity for dispensing.

entry.title: Issue with SAP Yard Logistics: Visual Business Screen Not Displayed
entry.content:
Hi all,

I'm experiencing an issue in SAP Yard Logistics when attempting to open the Yard Cockpit or Yard Layout Editor. The Visual Business screen doesn't display correctly

I'm using the UI5 variant, and I can't seem to find any relevant errors in the backend. However, the Chrome console is showing the following errors:

GET https://hostname/sap/bc/webdynpro/SAPYL/null 500 (Internal Server Error)

Error: resource sap/ui/vbm/i18n/manifest.json could not be loaded from /sap/public/bc/ui5_ui5/resources/sap/ui/vbm/i18n/manifest.json

The system is loading the Visual Business navigation elements, but none of the Yard Logistics-specific elements like bins are displayed. Interestingly, I can load a different background map via the API and move it, so some parts of the Visual Business seem functional.

I have already verified that all installation prerequisites have been met, so I don't believe that's the root cause.

Has anyone encountered a similar issue or know of a possible solution? Any insights would be greatly appreciated!

Thanks in advance for your help!

entry.title: I have a issues reagrding the VAS KIT to stock in EWM- ERROR WHILE GENERATING OR UPDATING DELIVERY
entry.content:
Hello Guru, 

I am currently facing issue with regarding with VAS KIT to stock, as per the below screenshot- Document not created and error while creating or updating the delivery. 

I have configured WPT for KTSI and I have assinged the document type to WPT, 

I have created the VAS Bin and assinged the bin to VAS work center

2 packspec created one with KITS pack grp and the other one with my Packspec 

also updated VAS relevance for KITS. 

Could you please help what I may be missing still?

entry.title: I am facing an error in retrieving IBD in EWM, error message number - SR053 - An exception has occur
entry.content:
After creating the Delivery in S4 , I get the message Delivery has been distributed however when I go to EWM it does not bring the IBD. After checking  in the Queue SMQ1 it says "an exception has occurred that was not caught" Error message number  SR053 

Has anyone experienced this, I am using S4 system 2023 FSP 1

Thanks,

Faraz

entry.title: Material document not created for /SCWM/ADGI (stock reconciliation analysis)
entry.content:
Hi Folks, 

Stock discrepancy between ECC and EWM, and further analyzing for a product, user performed a /scwm/adgi scrapping transaction last month for which no material document created and no error queue in smq2. On the same day, other adgi scrapping transactions are visible in ECC. So we have no clue what happened to that particular scrapping that neither created a material doc nor it exists in inbound queue.

What could be the possible cause for this?

 - The error queue could have been accidently deleted by user ?  

 - qRFC connection lost and queue never got created in the first place?

 - Queue processed but ended in dump in ECC? 

Is there any table where I can see all successfully processed queues? 

Thanks,
Sri

entry.title: Handling Unit Replenishment Process in PSA with Pick HU
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We have a requirement to replenish Handling Units (HUs) to the Production Supply Area (PSA). The replenishment process is triggered by crate part replenishment. Our process involves picking full HUs from storage, moving them to an intermediate handover area on a trolley or pallet. From there, the pallet is moved through multiple handover areas, and finally, the HUs are delivered to individual destination bins in the PSA.

Our replenishment strategy is set up such that only full HUs are picked, and as a result, an HU warehouse task is created. However, we are encountering the following issues:

When an HU warehouse task is created, the RF screen for picking the HU is not appearing.
Even when we manually create a pick HU for the warehouse order (WO), the system does not determine it as the destination HU when confirming tasks via RFUI.
Could you please assist us in configuring the system to meet this requirement?

Thank you for your support.

entry.title: HU number is not generated in S4core in inbound delivery in EWM
entry.content:
Hello Experts, 

I am facing issue related to the HU creation inS4 core inbound process. I have maintained the number range external in ERP and internal in EWM. I want to pack material in EWM and communicate to S4 core side.

I have completed the process including automatic packing, creation of HU in EWM, addition of packaging line item in inbound delivery of S4core and goods receipt. Process is completed E2E but without creation of HU in S4 core.

Also having "Report HU data" configuration of INB document type in ERP integration. We have different number range for outbound and inbound HUs. so 2 internal number ranges available for 2 different packaging material types.

After maintaining overall configuration, HU is supposed to be created automatically in S4 core (ERP) but unfortunately it is not working.

Regards,

Gitesh

entry.title: How to massively change the stock removal indicators.
entry.content:
How to massively change the stock removal inciators for material master data?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Partial goods receipt in eWM then system is not creating inbound delivery automatically for open qty
entry.content:
If we do partial goods receipt in eWM then system is not creating inbound delivery automatically for remaining quantity. We have to manually create inbound delivery for remaining quantity.

I am using Process code I002 in embedded S4 HANA 2020 version. I didnt find any note suggesting that this does not work in embedded EWM only work in decentralized ewm .

Please help

Thanks

Arjun

entry.title: Create link between Handling Unit and Inbound Delivery through API
entry.content:
Hi how to link through api inbound Delivery number with Handling Unit?
Handling Unit was created through API with custom numbering. Wanted to add refrenceDocumentNumber (Inbound Delivery) The HU was created but the added Inbound Delivery number not.

Tried to create an Handling Unit item with the same refrenceDocumentNumber and refrenceDocumentNumberItem but API error says the parent Handling Unit has no refrenceDocumentNumber.

What is the process link Inbound Delivery and Handling Unit through API?

entry.title: Create link between Handling Unit and Inbound Delivery through API part2
entry.content:
Hi how to link through api inbound Delivery number with Handling Unit?
Handling Unit was created through API with custom numbering. Wanted to add refrenceDocumentNumber (Inbound Delivery) The HU was created but the added Inbound Delivery number not.

Tried to create an Handling Unit item with the same refrenceDocumentNumber and refrenceDocumentNumberItem but API error says the parent Handling Unit has no refrenceDocumentNumber.

What is the process link Inbound Delivery and Handling Unit through API?

entry.title: RF scanner loading carrier confirmation
entry.content:
Hello, 

When confirming multiple loading carriers during the goods receipt, the scanner awaits weight input for only 1 load carrier. 

As shown in the picture , 2 half pallets ( stacked on the euro pallet ) and 1 euro pallets are being confirmed. 

Why does the system not add up the weight of all loading carriers being confirmed?

if additional customizing has to be done to fix this please let me know. 

thanks in advance!

entry.title: EWM - Queue Type CDS View?
entry.content:
Hello,

We are working at a client that is a distribution center. We wish to group all outbound queues based on the method of transportation, LTL, Small Parcel, and FTL. We wish to use this grouping through Queue Type.

Unfortunately, I don't believe there is any released queries that has data from Queue Type. Has anyone found an alternative to this?

entry.title: Report to update PGI status in SAP EWM
entry.content:
Dear Team,

Good Day

We have a strange outbound delivery status in SAP EWM decentral 9.5 system.

The delivery belongs to year 2020, PGI completed, ECC status updated. Shipment invoicing, payments completed.

Now in EWM if we see the delivery status is Partially completed.

Due to which for planners the delivery is appearing in their due list.

We want to close this delivery or set the PGI status to completed.

I tried multiple ways to use Process code, /scwm/CHM_LOG and tried updating status, but nothing worked for me.

Can you please help to close this delivery, if there is any report or FM available using which we can close / update the status of old deliveries?

This EWM Decentral 9.5 system.

Thanks,

Hari.

@sapewm

EWM - Delivery Processing EWM - Goods Movement

entry.title: "Set Ready for Shipping" Warehouse Monitor
entry.content:
Hello,

the function "Set Ready for Shipping" in the warehouse monitor doesn't work.

Error Message see below.

Are there any settings to perform to use these functionality?

Thanks

Thomas

entry.title: Third party Stock
entry.content: Please, Somedody knows how Do I lanch in Accounting Third party in my company wit the same value of invoice?

entry.title: Verification Feilds in Mobile Data Entry/RFUI
entry.content:
Hi,

We have Created one validation profile for the Putaway process in RFUI to verify only the Material and Destination Bin. Though, this validation is in active we are still getting error to Verify batch as Error.

 

Kindly do the needful,

Thanks,

Saikumar

entry.title: Decimals not allowed for the product unit quantity (matl 1000103, batch 1000001604) error /SCWM/PRDI
entry.content:
I want to goods receipt to EWM with the material using a batch-specific unit of measure, so i got an error message; Decimals not allowed for the product unit quantity (matl 1000103, batch 1000001604) in /SCWM/PRDI screen also inbound delivery is blocked. 

Some details of the material; 

Is there any SAP note published for this problem? How can I solve this error?

entry.title: WAVE RELEASE based on DELIVERY CREATION DATE or PLANNED SHIP DATE in SAP EWM
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

Good day.

We have a requirement related to WAVE RELEASE based on DELIVERY CREATION date or PLANNED SHIP DATE.

My 1st question related to standard SAP EWM behavior, Wave release criteria confusion based on SAP F1 definition.

According to above, wave release should happen based on “yard departure date”,  below is our example:

Delivery created date 11/07/2024 / 14:00:04

Yard departure date. 11/08/2024

Planned GI on 11/08/2024

Wave Template, release days 0.

Wave release date  11/07/2024 / 15.01.00

As per standard behavior the Wave release date calculation is updating a day prior(yard date -1 day) to actual departure date form the yard, which is confusing, why it is taking -1 day?

Some other cases:

Ex 1: wave creation date 11-06-2024 and departure date from yard is 11-07-2024 release date is updated 11-06-2024  and wave got released on release date 11-06-2024 release time 15:01:00 as per wave template 

Ex 2: wave creation date 11-06-2024 and departure date from yard is 11-08-2024 release date is updated 11-07-2024 and wave would release on 11-07-2024 at 15:01:00

Ex 3: wave creation date 11-06-2024 and departure date from yard is 11-13-2024 release date is updated 11-07-2024 and wave would release on 11-12-2024 at 15:01:00 

 

Question 1 is: Why system taking Yard date -1 day for release?

Question 2 : If we want the wave release based on  DELIVERY CREATION date or PLANNED SHIP DATE any options available?

Kindly help to achieve this solution or to understand exact wave release logic.

Thanks,

Hari

 SAP Extended Warehouse Management SAP Community SAP Knowledge Warehouse 

@sapewm @SAP
